rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft Dott. Giovanni Bardi Franz Steiner Verlag Wiesbaden GmbH In Bybliotheca Vaticana, Akademie der Wissenschaften in Hamburg

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: On those who pray and give offerings
Concordance of the names of the months and weekdays
On the calculation of the maṭqǝʿ
ጸሎት። በእንተ። አንጸዋ። (Prayer against the mice)
ጸሎት፡ በእንተ፡ ሕማመ፡ ከብድ፡ (Prayer concerning the stomachache)
On the Christ Child according to No item: LIT1812GospelLuke.
Concordance of the Ethiopic and Latin names of the months
